data.response:
👍 to “Skullette: I carried the Rosethorn tote to brunch yesterday. 

a woman at the next table literally STOPPED mid-mimosa and said "what IS that bag?"

she couldn't stop staring at the ram skull with roses. called it "beautifully creepy."

(that's the best compliment this brand has ever received haha)

then she tried to BUY IT OFF MY ARM.

told her no ma'am, that one's MINE. but for YOU? 50% off today only: https://skl.pscrpt.io/axSTpx/JOGX8D

go be someone's brunch distraction lol

- Julie”
